---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem or need this feature would address.
> "As a user who… I want to… so that…"

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways to solve this?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other projects, etc.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this hasn't been requested before
- [ ] This is within the scope of a self-hosted router monitoring dashboard
